# simple-select

## Import

```typescript
import { LuSimpleSelectInputComponent, LuSelectPanelComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/simple-select';
```

## API Reference

### LuSimpleSelectInputComponent (component)

**Selector:** `lu-simple-select`

#### Inputs

| Property | Binding name | Type | Default | Required | Transform | Description |
|----------|-------------|------|---------|----------|-----------|-------------|
| `intl` | `intl` | `unknown` | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `autocomplete` | `autocomplete` | `AutoFill` | `'off'` | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ |

### LuSelectPanelComponent (component)

**Selector:** `lu-select-panel`

### Injection tokens

| Token | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `LU_SIMPLE_SELECT_TRANSLATIONS` | `unknown` | тАФ |
